canvasId.title: Slack Canvas ID
canvasId.description: Unique identifier of the existing canvas to share (e.g. F017CC8EGRG).
canvasId.einstein:description: Unique identifier of the existing canvas to share (e.g. F017CC8EGRG). This is required to ensure that the correct canvas document is shared.

userIds.title: Slack User IDs
userIds.description: A comma-separated list of Slack User IDs to share the provided Slack Canvas with.
userIds.einstein:description: A comma separated list of Slack User IDs to share the provided Slack Canvas with. A single Slack User ID is represented as a string like U987654321. If a string like <@U987654321> is provided extract a Slack User ID from it by removing the <@ and > characters. For example, the Slack User in <@U987654321> is U987654321. The input here needs to be a comma separated list of Slack User IDs like U12345678,U987654321,U781345729.

channelIds.title: Slack Channel IDs
channelIds.description: A comma-separated list of Slack Channel IDs to share the provided Slack Canvas with.
channelIds.einstein:description: A comma separated list of Slack Channel IDs to share the provided Slack Canvas with. A single Slack Channel ID is represented as a string like C987654321. If a string like <@C987654321> is provided extract a Slack Channel ID from it by removing the <@ and > characters. For example, the Slack User in <@C987654321> is C987654321. The input here needs to be a comma separated list of Slack Channel IDs like C12345678,C987654321,C781345729.

accessLevel.title: accessLevel
accessLevel.description: The access level for the shared Slack Canvas: view or edit.
accessLevel.einstein:description: The access level for the shared Slack Canvas: view or edit
